mapper.select: SELECT d.CHECKIN_ID AS checkinId, d.MEAL_PERIOD AS mealPeriod, d.SOURCE_TYPE AS sourceType, d.FOOD_ID AS foodId, d.FOOD_NAME AS foodName, d.CATEGORY_NAME AS categoryName, d.CALORIES_PER_GRAM AS caloriesPerGram, d.INPUT_UNIT AS inputUnit, d.INPUT_AMOUNT AS inputAmount, d.GRAMS AS grams, d.TOTAL_CALORIES AS totalCalories, d.IMAGE_OBJECT_KEY AS imageObjectKey, r.RECORD_TIME AS recordTime FROM CHECKIN_RECORDS r INNER JOIN CHECKIN_DIET_DETAILS d ON r.CHECKIN_ID = d.CHECKIN_ID WHERE r.USER_ID = #{userId} AND r.CHECKIN_TYPE = 1 AND r.CHECKIN_DATE = #{checkinDate} AND r.DEL_FLAG = 0 ORDER BY r.RECORD_TIME DESC
